hypothesis: The SPY/QQQ volatility risk premium (implied vol > realized vol) is a real systematic premium. The open question that decides everything is whether it is ORTHOGONAL to the live carry edge in crisis, or correlated return-stacking like overnight-QQQ.
rationale_citation: Coval & Shumway (2001); Bakshi & Kapadia (2003); Bollerslev, Tauchen & Zhou (2009)
vrp_existence_measure: implied_var(t) - forward_realized_var(t, t+21)  [BTZ; look-ahead; Stage 1 ONLY]

carry_comparators.primary: DBV (Invesco G10 carry ETF, 2006->2023-03) — covers GFC/COVID/2022
carry_comparators.third: overnight-QQQ return (re-derived) — the prior non-FX edge

both_sides_rule: Every regime split reports BOTH sides (calm VIX<=30 and stressed VIX>30). Never condition on outcome.

verdict_ladder.NOT_SIGNIFICANT: VRP does not exist (mean gap <= 0 or permutation p >= 0.05)
verdict_ladder.REJECTED_OOS: VRP exists but re-couples with carry in crisis -> return-stacking, STOP, do not procure option data
verdict_ladder.DATA_INSUFFICIENT: VRP exists AND is orthogonal to carry in crisis -> the iron-condor backtest is justified but needs real option chains
verdict_ladder.PARTIAL_CONFIRMATION: VRP exists, carry relationship indeterminate (no/insufficient comparator data)
verdict_ladder.VALID_EDGE: INTENTIONALLY UNREACHABLE without real historical option chains

isolation: sovereign/research/vrp/ imports nothing from sovereign/forex or sovereign/ict; may read their output files only.
no_mid_run_tuning: These parameters are frozen. scripts/validate_vrp.py reads this file and asserts code constants match it (tripwire).
